message:
refactor(pthread): remove cancellation host delegations

With TID tracking now covering host threads, cancellation functions
can use native TLS-based implementation for all threads:
- pthread_cancel → native cancel request
- pthread_setcancelstate → native TLS state
- pthread_setcanceltype → native TLS type
- pthread_testcancel → native pending check

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
